source_order_note: Both PDF copies place internal affidavit page 41 before internal affidavit page 40, followed by internal page 42. The source order is preserved and should be cited with this caveat.
principal_thesis: The interim order should be reconsidered or varied because, on the applicant's version, a preservatory ex parte order has evolved into an indefinite exclusionary governance, financial-information, litigation-pressure, and patrimonial-prejudice mechanism.

relations.evidence_function: Supports locus standi for governance participation and financial-information access.
Supports proportionality, variation, and independent-oversight relief.
Undermines any assumption that all banking action required joint or unilateral respondent control, subject to documentary verification.
Supports disclosure, oversight, and regulated participation relief.
Supports financial-abuse, balance-of-convenience, and prejudice arguments.
Supports financial transparency and commercial-crime investigation leads, pending source-document verification.
Supports narrow property-access and stock-collection variation relief.

events.description: Applicant alleges that business bank cards were claimed/cancelled before later-discovered July discrepancies.
FNB relationship manager allegedly confirmed that directors could act independently unless the mandate had changed.
R500,000 transfer allegedly made by the Second Respondent from Strategic Logistics to himself.
Interim order granted ex parte by Khumalo J.
R300,000 allegedly paid from Villa Via Arcadia to ENS.
Approximately R10 million allegedly transferred from company current accounts; specific Villa Via and RegimA Skin transfers alleged.
R90,000 allegedly paid from RegimA Skin Treatments to Elliot Attorneys.
Repeated contempt-related proceedings allegedly instituted after the interim order.
Audit report allegedly became known to the applicant through a supplementary affidavit.
Correspondence allegedly received concerning stock-take interference, improper supply, and lock changes.
First Respondent allegedly demanded immediate stock release and made further threats.
Circular allegedly redirected clients to different payment arrangements.
Notice of Motion seeks enrolment for reconsideration.

forum_routing.burden_posture: civil balance/procedural discretion; above 50% working coherence
forum_routing.recommended_next_step: Prepare one-page relief-evidence matrix and chronology.

forum_routing.burden_posture: administrative/regulatory complaint threshold; requires role records and resolutions
forum_routing.recommended_next_step: Add CIPC role records, MOIs, and governance correspondence.

forum_routing.burden_posture: requires specific data-processing proof beyond F012 alone
forum_routing.recommended_next_step: Cross-reference domain, email, and personal-information processing evidence from the broader corpus.

forum_routing.burden_posture: investigation-ready leads; criminal proof requires independent source records
forum_routing.recommended_next_step: Create transaction schedule with bank statements and beneficial-recipient mapping.

forum_routing.burden_posture: requires VAT, SARS, ledger, audit, and accounting source records
forum_routing.recommended_next_step: Treat F012 as lead material until tax/accounting exhibits are assembled.
